The Problem

The month end
always hits
differently.

You're a student. You have a ₹2,000 mess bill due tomorrow. Your parents transferred last week but the ATM queue is long and your UPI limit hit. Sound familiar?

Banks won't touch you. You don't have a credit history. Loan apps charge predatory interest. And borrowing from friends is always awkward.

Meanwhile, your batchmate has ₹5,000 sitting idle and wouldn't mind earning a small return — if only there was a safe way.

"There's a gap between students who need and students who have. UniFi is the bridge."

How It Works

Simple enough for
a 2 AM emergency.

Three roles. One platform. Money moves in under 30 minutes.

1
🎓
Verify Your Campus Identity
Sign up with your university email. Upload your student ID. Our admin reviews and approves you — usually within a few hours. No Aadhaar, no CIBIL, no nonsense.
For Borrowers & Providers
2
💸
Request or Browse Loans
Borrowers set an amount, pick a tenure (7, 14, or 30 days), and see the exact repayment upfront. Providers browse anonymous loan requests and fund the ones they like.
Borrowers request · Providers browse
3
⚡
Money Moves via UPI
Provider sends to UniFi escrow. We release to the borrower instantly. On due date, borrower repays through UPI. Provider receives principal + returns. UniFi takes a small cut.
Secure · Traceable · Fast
Three Portals

One platform.
Three perspectives.

Each role gets their own dashboard — built for exactly what they need.

🛡️
Admin Portal
Command Center
Full oversight of the entire platform. Review KYC, manage users, monitor every loan, configure platform fees, and keep the ecosystem healthy.
  • KYC approval queue
  • Real-time loan monitoring
  • User suspend / ban controls
  • Platform revenue analytics
  • Interest rate configuration
Admin access →
💳
Borrower Portal
Borrow Smart
Request money when you need it. See your credit score grow with every repayment. No judgment, no paperwork — just fast campus credit.
  • Loan request builder
  • Live repayment calculator
  • Credit score tracker
  • One-tap UPI repayment
  • Borrowing limit upgrades
Start borrowing →
📈
Provider Portal
Earn Returns
Put your idle money to work. Browse anonymous loan requests from verified campusmates, fund them, and earn returns — all tracked in real time.
  • Loan marketplace
  • Anonymous borrower profiles
  • Portfolio earnings tracker
  • Risk & credit score filters
  • UPI wallet & withdrawals
Start earning →
The Money Flow

Transparent by design.
Secure by default.

📱
Provider
Funds the loan
UPI Transfer
₹ Principal
🔐
UniFi Escrow
Holds & routes
Instant Release
₹ To Borrower
🎓
Borrower
Receives money
Example — ₹2,000 loan · 30 days
Loan Principal₹2,000
Interest (5% flat)₹100
Platform Fee (10% of interest)₹10
Provider earns₹90 net
Borrower repays
Principal + interest, one payment
₹2,100
Community Power

Students helping
students.

When you borrow from UniFi, you're not borrowing from a bank. You're borrowing from a verified campusmate who believes in you.

This shared identity creates real accountability. The community keeps itself honest — because everyone knows the stakes.

STUDENT VOICE
"Got ₹2,000 from a batchmate I've never met. Repaid in 12 days. My UniFi score went up. That's it. That's the whole story."
— UniFi #3392 · BITS Goa
Built for Trust

We take your money
seriously.

Every layer of UniFi is built to protect both sides of every loan.

🎓
Campus-Only Network
Accessible only to students with verified university email IDs. No outsiders.
🔐
KYC Verification
Every user's student ID is manually reviewed by our admin team before activation.
🔒
Escrow Protection
Funds are never held directly. UniFi escrow routes all transactions via Razorpay.
📊
Credit Consequences
Late repayments hit your UniFi score. Defaults freeze your account. Real stakes.
